mapper.select: /* OutboundOrderCloseMapper.xml - selectOutboundHeaderListForInterfaceSend - 출고마감 인터페이스 송신 대상 조회 */ SELECT CTKEY ,OWKEY ,OBHDKEY ,OBORDKEY ,ORHDKEY ,DLVRYCORPCD ,WBLNO ,OBSTATUSCD ,COALESCE(WKTYPECD, 'ET') AS WKTYPECD FROM TWORK_INFO_OB_HD WHERE CTKEY = #{ctkey} AND OWKEY = #{owkey} AND OBHDTYPECD IN ('10', '20') /* 일반출고, 교환출고 */ AND OBSTATUSCD IN ('60','65','70') /* 출고상태 : 60(미출고), 65(부분출고), 70(출고완료) */ AND OBDDLNSNDRSLTCD = '00' /* 출고마감송신결과코드 : 00(대기) */ AND OBCNFRMDATE IS NOT NULL ORDER BY TO_DATE(OBCNFRMDATE, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') LIMIT 50

/* OutboundOrderCloseMapper.xml - selectOutboundDetailListForInterfaceSend - 출고상세 / 출고마감 인터페이스 송신 대상 조회 */ SELECT ORDTKEY ,OBCNFRMDATE ,CASE WHEN INITQTY > CNFRMQTY THEN '03' ELSE NULL END AS NISCD ,ICKEY ,UOM ,INITQTY AS EXPCTQTY ,CNFRMQTY FROM TWORK_INFO_OB_DT WHERE CTKEY = #{ctkey} AND OWKEY = #{owkey} AND OBHDKEY = #{obhdkey}
